name: Hrishi Raj Soni
summary:
Qualified Company Secretary (ICSI) with 5+ years of experience in corporate governance, Companies Act,
2013 compliance, SEBI Listing Regulations, secretarial functions, legal documentation, statutory
compliance, and regulatory filings across listed and unlisted organizations. Experienced in Board and
Committee management, stock exchange coordination, due diligence, governance advisory, and
regulatory stakeholder management including support for IPO-related compliance activities.
bio:
Qualified Company Secretary (ICSI) with 5+ years of experience in corporate governance, Companies Act,
2013 compliance, SEBI Listing Regulations, secretarial functions, legal documentation, statutory
compliance, and regulatory filings across listed and unlisted organizations. Experienced in Board and
Committee management, stock exchange coordination, due diligence, governance advisory, and
regulatory stakeholder management including support for IPO-related compliance activities.
objective:
Qualified Company Secretary (ICSI) with 5+ years of experience in corporate governance, Companies Act,
2013 compliance, SEBI Listing Regulations, secretarial functions, legal documentation, statutory
compliance, and regulatory filings across listed and unlisted organizations. Experienced in Board and
Committee management, stock exchange coordination, due diligence, governance advisory, and
regulatory stakeholder management including support for IPO-related compliance activities.
title: Company Secretary
skills: Corporate Compliance & Filings (roc, Sebi, Annual Filings)
Entity Formation (pvt Ltd, Llp, Opc, Section 8)

experience.title: Manager – Company Secretary
experience.description:
Manage end-to-end compliance under SEBI LODR Regulations and Companies Act provisions.
Prepare Board and Committee agendas, notices, resolutions, and minutes.
Maintain statutory registers and corporate records.
Coordinate stock exchange filings and regulatory submissions.
Handle XBRL filing and statutory reporting requirements.
Liaise with auditors, legal teams, and regulatory stakeholders.
Support due diligence processes and lender documentation.
Track compliance calendars to ensure timely statutory compliance.
Supported IPO-related compliance activities including coordination of due diligence,
preparation/review of regulatory documentation, liaison with intermediaries, and monitoring
listing requirements.

experience.title: Assistant Manager – Company Secretary
experience.company: Kamal Sponge Steel and Power Ltd
experience.description:
Managed ROC compliance and statutory filings.
Maintained corporate records and annual compliance activities.
Coordinated with banks and financial institutions.
Supported debt syndication activities and compliance documentation.
Contributed toward reduction in borrowing costs on ₹500 Cr facility through effective
compliance management.

rawText:
Contact: 7566770072
Email: Hrishisoni4@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hrishiraj-soni-548760a6

Hrishi Raj Soni
Company Secretary
Address: Kolar Road, Bhopal (M.P.)
Profile
Qualified Company Secretary (ICSI) with 5+ years of experience in corporate governance, Companies Act,
2013 compliance, SEBI Listing Regulations, secretarial functions, legal documentation, statutory
compliance, and regulatory filings across listed and unlisted organizations. Experienced in Board and
Committee management, stock exchange coordination, due diligence, governance advisory, and
regulatory stakeholder management including support for IPO-related compliance activities.
Education
Qualified CS, ICSI|M.Com| B. Com, DAVV, Indore (2015-2017)
Professional Experience
Dilip Buildcon Limited – Bhopal, M.P.
Manager – Company Secretary (2023–Present)
Listed Infrastructure Conglomerate
• Manage end-to-end compliance under SEBI LODR Regulations and Companies Act provisions.
• Prepare Board and Committee agendas, notices, resolutions, and minutes.
• Maintain statutory registers and corporate records.
• Coordinate stock exchange filings and regulatory submissions.
• Handle XBRL filing and statutory reporting requirements.
• Liaise with auditors, legal teams, and regulatory stakeholders.
• Support due diligence processes and lender documentation.
• Track compliance calendars to ensure timely statutory compliance.
• Supported IPO-related compliance activities including coordination of due diligence,
preparation/review of regulatory documentation, liaison with intermediaries, and monitoring
listing requirements.

Kamal Sponge Steel and Power Ltd – Maihar, M.P.
Assistant Manager – Company Secretary (2021–2023)
Group Company of KJS Cement (I) Ltd.
• Managed ROC compliance and statutory filings.
• Maintained corporate records and annual compliance activities.
• Coordinated with banks and financial institutions.
• Supported debt syndication activities and compliance documentation.

• Contributed toward reduction in borrowing costs on ₹500 Cr facility through effective
compliance management.

Velnik India Pvt. Ltd. – Indore, M.P.
Company Secretary – Consultant (2020–2021)
FMCG Sector Company
• Drafted and reviewed agreements, NDAs, and commercial contracts.
• Managed trademark filing and legal documentation.
• Coordinated with external legal counsel.

Various Clients (Consultancy Practice) – Bhopal, M.P.
Company Secretary (2018–2020)
• Incorporated 25+ entities including Private Limited Companies, LLPs, and OPCs.
• Managed complete lifecycle compliance and statutory filings.
• Prepared due diligence and search reports.

Key Skills
• Entity Formation (Pvt Ltd, LLP, OPC, Section 8)
• Corporate Compliance & Filings (ROC, SEBI, Annual Filings)
• Board Processes & Corporate Governance
• Legal Documentation & Contract Management
• Due Diligence & Regulatory Filings
• Document Management & Record Keeping
• Client & Stakeholder Communication
• Deadline Tracking & Workflow Management
• IPO Compliance Support

Career Achievements
• Independently managed compliance and filings for 25+ entities across structures
• Drafted and negotiated 50+ legal agreements, reducing dependency on external counsel
• Managed and protected trademark portfolio of 250+ marks
• Supported credit rating improvement through structured disclosures and coordination.
